title: Alive

lyrics.text: Tonight I'm losing my layers
I'm letting you know
So won't you come back into me where you belong
lyrics.translation: 你会回来吗 你的栖身之所

lyrics.text: Losing my layers, I'm letting you know
lyrics.translation: 我已失去控制 只想让你知

lyrics.text: So won't you come back into me where you belong
lyrics.translation: 你会回来吗 你的栖身之所

lyrics.text: Won't you come back into me where you belong
All we ever wanted is to feel alive
lyrics.translation: 我们的唯一追求只是活的自在

lyrics.text: Bathing in moonlight and the time's so right
lyrics.translation: 沐浴月光之下 时间如此恰当

lyrics.text: We all share this moment and the red sunrise
So just hold on tight in this walk of life
All we ever wanted is to feel alive
lyrics.translation: 我们的唯一追求只是活的自在

lyrics.text: Bathing in moonlight and the time's so right
lyrics.translation: 沐浴月光之下 随心而欲

lyrics.text: We all share this moment and the red sunrise
So just hold on tight in this walk of life
In this walk of life
In this walk of life
Tonight I'll breath in the future
lyrics.translation: 夜晚时分 我就要感受新一天的到来

lyrics.text: And tear down my walls
So we can let every single barrier fall
lyrics.translation: 我们可以冲破一切障碍

lyrics.text: I am Losing my layers, I'm letting you know
lyrics.translation: 我已失去控制 只想让你知

lyrics.text: So won't you come back into me where you belong
lyrics.translation: 你会回来吗 你的栖身之所

lyrics.text: Won't you come back into me where you belong
All we ever wanted is to feel alive
lyrics.translation: 我们的唯一追求只是活的自在

lyrics.text: Bathing in moonlight and the time's so right
lyrics.translation: 沐浴月光之下 时间如此恰当

lyrics.text: We all share this moment and the red sunrise
So just hold on tight in this walk of life
Alive, alive, alive
All we ever wanted is to feel alive
lyrics.translation: 我们的唯一追求只是活的自在

lyrics.text: In this walk of life
In this walk of life
Alive, alive, alive
All we ever wanted is to feel alive
